title: Notification says 'Relay connected' regardless of actual state
description: buildNotification() in NieForegroundService always sets contentText to 'Relay connected'. The service is started on first successful auth and stopped on auth failure or explicit disconnect — but it is NOT stopped or updated during reconnect attempts. If the WebSocket drops and RelayService begins exponential backoff reconnection, the notification still says 'Relay connected', contradicting the app UI which shows the reconnecting spinner. Users filing issues will attach screenshots showing 'Relay connected' in the shade — misleading support. Fix: either add a MethodChannel call to update the notification text on reconnect state changes, or change the text to 'nie is running' (state-neutral).
